description_long: This is a blue industrial shipping container, commonly referred to as a 'mini-box', with corrugated steel walls and reinforced corners. The front and one side display stenciled white text, including serial numbers and the label 'mini-BOX', suggesting it is used for storage or transport. The container features yellow and black hazard stripes along the top edge, indicating caution during handling. The rear side is equipped with vertical locking bars and horizontal braces, typical of secure shipping containers. The surface shows signs of weathering and rust, giving it a rugged, utilitarian appearance. Its robust construction and size make it suitable for placement in urban environments such as loading docks, construction sites, or industrial yards.
description: A blue, weathered steel shipping container labeled 'mini-BOX' with hazard stripes and locking bars, designed for secure storage or transport in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'mini-BOX' label, serial numbers, and hazard stripes along the top edge.
description_view_1: Side view with plain corrugated steel, hazard stripes at the top, and no visible markings or locking mechanisms.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to the front, with 'mini-BOX' label and serial numbers, but mirrored orientation.
description_view_3: Rear view featuring vertical locking bars and horizontal braces, indicating the main access door for the container.
attribute_labeling_or_signage: stenciled white text and serial numbers on front and side panels
attribute_handles_or_grips: vertical locking bars on rear doors serve as handles
